serviceNotes.engine oil: 2.2L six-cylinder in 320i saloon/Touring and 320Ci coupé/convertible (market-dependent); fixed-interval EU oil ~15,000 km typical.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW owner's manual E46 — Oil Service; 15,000 km common EU standard-oil schedule. Tier 2: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2140-2000/service lists 10,000 km / 12 months for compiled 320i (M54 era) — verify oil spec / booklet
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E46 — cabin microfilter on Inspection II cadence (~30,000 km typical EU spacing)
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4 LV)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW owner's manual E46 — engine air filter ~30,000 km typical Inspection II spacing. Tier 2: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2140-2000/service lists 20,000 km — confirm printed table
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2140-2000/service — six spark plugs 60,000 km (matches file); BMW owner's manual E46
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake inspection ~15,000 km service cadence
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake inspection ~15,000 km service cadence
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E46 — Inspection I/II vehicle check (~60,000 km typical EU spacing)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: ZF/BMW specialist consensus; ATF often lifetime-fill per OEM — preventive independent interval
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: BMW owner's manual — no routine manual trans fluid interval stated; preventive specialist interval
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E46 coolant interval by model; file value preventive — confirm booklet
